summary: Phase 2a end-to-end testing: application flow (apply/withdraw/select/unselect/mark-rehomed/unrehome) + admin warehouse checkbox. 21/21 backend pytest tests pass. UI flows verified for both applicant (Samir) and owner (Lotte) roles including selected-contact-banner exchange, status transitions, and admin-only wizard toggle.

minor.issue: When Samir applies on 'Rode fluwelen gordijnen' the server short-circuits with 'eigen aanbieding' (own listing) before reaching the 'eigen organisatie' check — both produce 400 but the message differs from the spec wording. Accepted in tests as semantically equivalent.

issues: Green 'JIJ BENT GEKOZEN!' banner uses muted/cream contrast — acceptable but the body text on cream background has slightly low contrast (still WCAG AA borderline). Cosmetic only.

action_items: Consider returning a more informative ApplyPanel/notice on detail pages when 'apply' is blocked because the listing is the user's own listing (or own org) — currently the UI simply hides the apply button without a clarifying message (only blocked-by-org spec mention; own-listing case shows the OwnerPanel which is OK).
Optional: implement admin DELETE /api/listings/{id} cleanup or cascading delete (TEST_ listings created during testing cannot be removed and accumulate; not blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py — apply endpoint correctly enforces ordering: own-listing → 400, recurrent → 400, own-org → 400, duplicate open → 409. Validated via tests.
Wizard correctly gates `placeInWarehouse` server-side: when sent by non-admin user, server ignores it and defaults to 'beschikbaar' (test passes).
ListingWizard.jsx guards the checkbox UI behind `isAdmin` and also zeros the field client-side before submit — defence in depth, good.
ApplicantPanel / OwnerPanel / SelectedContactBanner data-testids are all present and used; nav-aanvragen link visible in header for validated users.
Seed adds a duplicate 'TEST_phase2_listing' / 'TEST_warehouse_listing' on repeated runs (no upsert) — minor catalog noise but not a functional issue.
test_credentials: admin@inlimbo.be / Admin123!, lotte@atelier-brussel.example / User123!, samir@vagebond.example / User123! — Note: seed pending users (nora.pending@*, tom@deschakel.example) have been APPROVED by prior iterations and are now 'validated'. Tests requiring a pending user now register a fresh TEST_pending_* user dynamically.
seed_data_creation: Test created a temporary listing 'TEST_phase2_listing' owned by Lotte for state-transition tests (still in DB). Admin warehouse test created 'TEST_warehouse_listing' (status=in_magazijn). Lotte created 'TEST_ignored_warehouse' to verify placeInWarehouse is ignored. These remain in the catalog (no DELETE endpoint exposed) — non-blocking. Lariks balken seed state restored to 'beschikbaar' with 1 open Samir application post-test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seed pending users have been approved during iteration 1 admin testing; to test pending-user-403 cases register a fresh user via /api/auth/register/new-org with orgCategory in {'Beeldende kunsten','Jeugdwerk','Podiumkunsten','Squad','Sociaal werk','Sport','Educatie','Ander'}. Lariks balken listing id: 54434969-9894-445d-8f1e-e96884d25ce9. Multiple TEST_ listings accumulate on repeated seed runs — be aware when filtering. Public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://limbo-stage.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca of the issue: N/A — no critical bug found. All Phase 2a acceptance criteria from the review request validated.
